title: EvalCase
description: A single test case in an eval suite: the input given to the system-under-test plus optional expected output, retrieval context, and metadata. The smallest reusable unit of evaluation — equivalent to a row in a Hugging Face dataset, a 'golden' in DeepEval, or an example in LangSmith.

input.description: The prompt or input string given to the system-under-test.
input.example: What is the refund window for a damaged item?

input_structured.description: Structured input when the case is not a single string (multi-turn conversation, agent goal, tool-calling task).

expected.description: Ground-truth expected output for reference-based scoring. Optional.
expected.example: 30 days from delivery for damaged items.

expected_structured.description: Structured ground-truth (expected tool calls, expected agent trajectory, JSON answer).

context.description: Optional retrieval context provided to the model for RAG-style cases.
example: Refund policy section 4.2: Damaged items may be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata: difficulty, domain, persona, source URL, license.
